name: Evaluator-Optimizer (Critique Loop)
description: Generator/evaluator critique loop for self-improving content quality. One agent generates, another critiques with specific feedback, loop continues until quality threshold is met.

resources.name: AgentCore Runtime
resources.description: Managed container runtime for the evaluator-optimizer agent

resources.name: AgentCore Endpoint
resources.description: Public endpoint for invoking the agent

resources.name: IAM Role + 5 Policies
resources.description: Bedrock invoke, ECR pull, CloudWatch logs, CloudWatch metrics, X-Ray tracing

pattern_description: Generator-evaluator critique loop. One agent generates content, another evaluates it with specific feedback and a score. The generator revises based on feedback. Loop continues until quality threshold is met. Use this for high-quality content generation where first-draft quality isn't sufficient.

parameters.name: container_image_uri
parameters.description: ECR image URI for the agent container
